name: Grace Community Church Community Health Fair
summary: Free community health screenings, wellness resources, and chaplaincy information. Organized by Deacon Mosley and Rebecca Price. Open to all Memphis residents.

name: Morning Reflections Live: Radio Anniversary Listener Meetup
summary: Celebrate seven years of Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Live studio tour, Q&A with Rebecca, and light brunch. Space is limited.

name: APC Mid-South Chapter: Compassion Fatigue & Chaplain Self-Care Workshop
summary: Half-day CPE continuing education workshop for board-certified chaplains covering compassion fatigue, boundary-setting, and sustainable ministry. 4 CPE hours awarded.

name: APC Mid-South: Palliative Care & Spiritual Assessment Seminar
summary: Full-day CPE continuing education seminar on spiritual assessment tools in palliative care settings. 6 CPE hours. Open to APC members and CPE residents.

name: Grace Community Church Fall Festival & Trunk-or-Treat
summary: Annual fall festival for Grace Community Church families. Rebecca Price emcees. Games, food, trunk-or-treat, and a short devotional. All ages welcome.

name: Morning Reflections Community Prayer Breakfast
summary: A community prayer breakfast with live worship music, a short meditation from Rebecca Price, and fellowship. Sponsored by Covenant Insurance Group and Mitchell's Flowers.

name: Bluff City Wellness: Faith, Grief, and Healing Panel
summary: A community panel on navigating grief, loss, and healing through faith. Rebecca Price moderates. Open to Memphis residents; free and open to the public.

name: New Year Dawn Service - Grace Community Church
summary: Annual New Year dawn service at Grace Community Church, a service of new beginnings and light in the darkness. Rebecca Price delivers the meditation. Outdoor service followed by fellowship breakfast.

name: APC Mid-South: Ethics in End-of-Life Chaplaincy (Online)
summary: Virtual CPE continuing education session on ethical frameworks for end-of-life spiritual care in hospital settings. 3 CPE hours. Zoom link provided upon registration.

name: Bluff City Women's Wellness Luncheon
summary: Annual wellness luncheon celebrating women's health and community care in Memphis. Keynote speaker and panel. Rebecca Price delivers the opening invocation.

name: Morning Reflections Holiday Special - Live Taping
summary: Live taping of the Morning Reflections holiday special. Audience seating for 40. Worship music, community prayers, and holiday reflections with Rebecca Price. Sponsors: Covenant Insurance Group.

name: APC Annual Conference - Mid-South Regional Session
summary: Regional session of the APC Annual Conference: presentations on hospital chaplaincy, CPE supervision, and spiritual care innovations. 8 CPE hours. Registration required.

name: Honoring the Women of Faith Community Brunch - Grace Community Church
summary: Community brunch at Grace Community honoring the women of faith in the congregation. Family gathering, worship, and appreciation for mothers and caregivers in the congregation. Rebecca helps organize and opens with prayer.

name: Grief Support Circle - Open Community Session
summary: Monthly open grief support circle facilitated by chaplains from across Memphis. No cost, no registration required. Recurring on the second Tuesday of each month.

name: Morning Reflections: Faith & Mental Health Community Forum
summary: A candid community forum on faith, mental health, and destigmatization of counseling in Black churches. Co-hosted with Sandra Coles. Sponsored by Bluff City Auto Care.
